listId.description: The unique ID of the list that contains the specified list_entry_id. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

limit.description: Max number of results to return

entityId.description: The unique ID of the entity (person, organization, or opportunity) to add to this list

creator_id.description: The ID of a Person resource who should be recorded as adding the entry to the list. Must be a person who can access Affinity. If not provided the creator defaults to the owner of the API key.

persons.description: Persons that the new organization will be associated with. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

organizations.description: Organizations that the person is associated with. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

listEntryId.description: The unique ID of the list entry object to be deleted

domain.description: The domain name of the organization

firstName.description: The first name of the person

lastName.description: The last name of the person

organizations.description: Organizations that the person is associated with. Choose from the list, or specify IDs using an expression.

withInteractionDates.description: Whether interaction dates will be present on the returned resources

term.description: A string used to search all the persons in your team’s address book. This could be an email address, a first name or a last name.

firstName.description: The first name of the person

lastName.description: The last name of the person

emails.description: The email addresses of the person
